info.name: Ecommerce — Data Seed & E2E Flow
info.description: Run these requests IN ORDER with Collection Runner. Ecommerce-Local supplies only baseUrl; collection scripts seed token, IDs, names, coupon codes, and idempotency keys into collection variables and mirror them into the active environment for the next request. Covers register -> catalog setup -> inventory -> cart -> coupon -> order -> payment -> approved review -> wishlist -> notifications.

exec: var token = json && json.data && (typeof json.data === 'string' ? json.data : json.data.token);
pm.test('02a — Login as Admin: status 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
var token = typeof data === 'string' ? data : data && (data.token || data.accessToken || data.jwt);
pm.test('Login role is ADMIN', function () { if (data && typeof data === 'object' && data.role) { pm.expect(data.role).to.equal('ADMIN'); } });
console.log('Inventory service not ready; retrying Seed Inventory ' + (retryCount + 1) + '/' + maxRetries);
pm.test('08a — Set Product Inventory (50 units): status 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Coupon ID present', function () { pm.expect(json.data && json.data.id).to.be.a('string'); });
pm.test('Coupon code matches runner value', function () { pm.expect(json.data && json.data.code).to.equal(pm.collectionVariables.get('couponCode')); });
pm.test('09a — List All Coupons as Admin: status 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Admin coupon list is an array', function () { pm.expect(json.data).to.be.an('array'); });
pm.test('Created coupon is visible to admin', function () { pm.expect(json.data.some(function (coupon) { return coupon.id === pm.collectionVariables.get('couponId'); })).to.equal(true); });
pm.test('09b — Restore Customer Login: status 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
var token = typeof data === 'string' ? data : data && (data.token || data.accessToken || data.jwt);
pm.test('Login role is CUSTOMER', function () { if (data && typeof data === 'object' && data.role) { pm.expect(data.role).to.equal('CUSTOMER'); } });

exec: console.log('Cart add dependency not ready; retrying Add Product to Cart ' + (retryCount + 1) + '/' + maxRetries);
pm.test('Cart has seeded item', function () { pm.expect(json.data.items || []).to.have.length.above(0); });
pm.test('Cart contains seeded item', function () { pm.expect(json.data && json.data.items || []).to.have.length.above(0); });
pm.test('Cart total is positive', function () { pm.expect(json.data && json.data.totalAmount).to.be.above(0); });
pm.test('Coupon is valid', function () { pm.expect(json.data && json.data.valid).to.equal(true); });
pm.test('Coupon discount is positive', function () { pm.expect(json.data && json.data.discountAmount).to.be.above(0); });
console.log('Order dependencies not ready; retrying Place Order ' + (retryCount + 1) + '/' + maxRetries);
console.log('Payment not SUCCESS yet (' + status + '); retrying Get Payment ' + (retryCount + 1) + '/' + maxRetries);
pm.test('Order history includes seeded order', function () {
console.log('Review eligibility not ready; retrying Submit Product Review ' + (retryCount + 1) + '/' + maxRetries);
pm.test('Review ID present', function () { pm.expect(json.data && json.data.id).to.be.a('string'); });
pm.test('Review status is APPROVED', function () { pm.expect(json.data && json.data.status).to.equal('APPROVED'); });
pm.test('Seed approved review available', function () { pm.expect(reviews.length).to.be.above(0); });
pm.test('Seed summary includes approved review', function () { pm.expect(json.data && json.data.totalReviews).to.be.above(0); });
pm.test('Wishlist item has productId', function () { pm.expect(json.data && json.data.productId).to.equal(pm.collectionVariables.get('productId')); });
console.log('Notifications not available yet; retrying ' + (retryCount + 1) + '/' + maxRetries);
pm.test('26 — Login as Admin for Analytics: status 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
var token = typeof data === 'string' ? data : data && (data.token || data.accessToken || data.jwt);
pm.test('Login role is ADMIN', function () { if (data && typeof data === 'object' && data.role) { pm.expect(data.role).to.equal('ADMIN'); } });
pm.test('Analytics summary has ISO range', function () { pm.expect(data.from).to.match(/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/); pm.expect(data.to).to.match(/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/); });

pm.test('Analytics summary has non-negative metrics', function () { pm.expect(data.revenue).to.be.a('number').and.at.least(0); pm.expect(data.orderCount).to.be.a('number').and.at.least(0); pm.expect(data.averageOrderValue).to.be.a('number').and.at.least(0); });
pm.test('Top Product Analytics: status 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Top product analytics is an array', function () { pm.expect(rows).to.be.an('array'); });
pm.test('Top product analytics respects limit', function () { pm.expect(rows.length).to.be.at.most(10); });

if (rows.length) { pm.test('Top product analytics row contract', function () { pm.expect(rows[0].productId).to.be.a('string'); pm.expect(rows[0].productName).to.be.a('string'); pm.expect(rows[0].quantity).to.be.a('number'); pm.expect(rows[0].revenue).to.be.a('number'); }); }
pm.test('30 — Deactivate Seed Coupon: status 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Coupon active state is false', function () { pm.expect(json.data.active).to.equal(false); });
pm.test('31 — Reactivate Seed Coupon: status 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Coupon active state is true', function () { pm.expect(json.data.active).to.equal(true); });
var token = typeof data === 'string' ? data : data && (data.token || data.accessToken || data.jwt);
var notifications = Array.isArray(data) ? data : (data && Array.isArray(data.content) ? data.content : []);
